display.purpose: Hero headlines only. One per page.

headline.purpose: Section headers. Stand alone, never paired with an eyebrow above.

title.purpose: Subheads, card titles in dense layouts. Always supports a larger heading.

body.purpose: Long-form copy. Capped at 65 to 75 characters per line.

label.purpose: Navigation, buttons, chips, uppercase eyebrows (when used inside form sections at 10px / 2.5px tracking).

shadows.name: search-shadow
shadows.purpose: The SearchBar pill at rest. The signature lifted element of the landing.

shadows.name: popover-shadow
shadows.purpose: Where / When / Who / What popovers. Slightly heavier than the pill they emerge from.

shadows.name: card-rest-shadow
shadows.purpose: Edge definition for cards on the canvas. Reads more as outline than as elevation.

shadows.name: card-hover-shadow
shadows.purpose: Card on hover, paired with -2px translateY.

shadows.name: logo-glow
shadows.purpose: The First Light wash under the Walter logo chip. The only blue glow in the system.

motion.name: ease-cinematic
motion.purpose: Default easing. Used for hero entrance (600ms), popover entry/exit (180ms), state changes (150ms).

components.name: Primary Button (Search)
components.description: Cornflower fill pill with a leading icon. The single accent-colored action target.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="18" height="18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m20 20-3.5-3.5"/></svg>Search</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(0.65 0.135 263); color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); border: none; border-radius: 980px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: -0.2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.72 0.11 261); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.135 263); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (Get Started)
components.description: Outlined pill used in the navbar. De-emphasized so the SearchBar action stays primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 980px; padding: 6px 16px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.40); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.135 263); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link (Active)
components.description: Pill-shaped nav link. Shows default and active states side by side.
components.html: Quick planExploreSavedTrips
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 4px; padding: 6px; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.82); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-radius: 980px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 980px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); } .ds-nav-link-active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); }

components.name: Trip Card
components.description: Community trip card with photograph, destination, support copy, and a price/upvote footer.
components.html:
Featured

Reykjavík, Iceland

Five days chasing the light over the Westfjords.

$2,140248
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; background: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .ds-card-image { position: relative; height: 144px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.30 0.05 263), oklch(0.18 0.008 250)); } .ds-card-tier { position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; background: oklch(0.12 0.008 250 / 0.85); color: oklch(0.72 0.11 261); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 980px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.2; color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); } .ds-card-desc { margin: 4px 0 0; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.35; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); min-height: 32px; } .ds-card-foot { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-top: 10px; margin-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-card-price { font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: oklch(0.72 0.11 261); } .ds-card-up { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }

components.name: SearchBar Pill
components.description: The signature airbnb-style 4-section search pill. Shown in idle state with one section active.
components.css: .ds-search { display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; padding: 6px; background: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 980px; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search-section { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding: 6px 20px; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 980px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-search-section:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-search-section-active { background: oklch(0.28 0.008 250); box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-search-label { margin: 0 0 2px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); } .ds-search-value { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-search-placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-weight: 400; } .ds-search-divider { width: 1px; margin: 10px 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); } .ds-search-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-left: 4px; padding: 12px 20px; background: oklch(0.65 0.135 263); color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); border: none; border-radius: 980px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-search-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.72 0.11 261); }

components.name: Popover Shell
components.description: Anchored dropdown that emerges below an active SearchBar section. Quiet Slate surface, heavy popover shadow.
components.html: Suggested destinations
components.css: .ds-popover { width: 360px; padding: 16px; background: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-popover-eyebrow { margin: 0 0 8px; padding: 0 4px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); } .ds-popover-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 12px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-popover-row:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-popover-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; background: rgba(91,141,239,0.15); border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-popover-text { min-width: 0; } .ds-popover-title { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.985 0.006 250); } .ds-popover-sub { margin: 2px 0 0; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }

components.name: Tier Badge Chip
components.description: Read-only metadata chip that sits on top of card photography. Tinted Pitch background lets the photograph remain visible at the edges.
components.css: .ds-chip-tier { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.12 0.008 250 / 0.85); color: oklch(0.72 0.11 261); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 980px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); }

narrative.overview:
Walter holds the frame the way a filmmaker holds it: still, considered, and trusting that the place will do the work. The system is dark not because dark is fashionable but because Walter is the moment in the Mitty film when the sky cracks open over a cold ocean. Restraint is in service of warmth, not corporate neutrality. Photography always beats decoration. Every screen exists to drive toward one moment: a real flight, a real hotel, and a real Tuesday dinner sitting in the same cart, ready to book.

The system rejects the lane of Kayak / Expedia / Booking.com (transactional grey portals where every screen looks like a 1099), the lane of Pinterest-pretty travel listicles, and the lane of generic AI startup landings. Walter does not list, it commits. Walter does not announce that it is intelligent.

The visual character borrows from Patagonia and Airbnb 2014 to 2017. It is warm in a dark room.
keyCharacteristics: Tinted-blue near-black canvas; cornflower as the only voice.
Real photography, never illustration, on any surface that has room for an image.
Tonal layering for depth; shadow only on the SearchBar and popovers as a structural cue.
Geist Sans throughout; one type family, sharp scale ratios.
Confidence in motion: exponential ease, never bounce, never announce.

rules.name: The Field Cinematographer Rule
rules.body: If a screen would still make the user want to go after the copy was removed, it is working. If the copy is doing the lifting, the imagery is too weak or the layout is too busy.

rules.name: The Booking Spine Rule
rules.body: Every page must answer the question 'what gets the user closer to a real booking?' If the answer is 'more options,' the page is wrong.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Cornflower Beacon appears on at most ten percent of any rendered screen. Its scarcity is the point. If two cornflower elements compete in a viewport, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Anti-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Linear gradients are prohibited on body surfaces. The only allowed gradient is the off-center cornflower radial in the hero, and the logo's first-light wash inside its 7x7 chip. No gradient text. Ever.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never #000, never #fff. Every neutral carries the 250-degree hue tint at chroma 0.006 to 0.008.

rules.name: The Earned Superlative Rule
rules.body: Walter never uses 'amazing,' 'stunning,' 'you have to see.' Type carries no exclamation marks. If a phrase needs an adjective to land, the typography is too small or the photograph above it is too weak.

rules.name: The One-Headline Rule
rules.body: A page has one Display. No double heroes, no eyebrow-plus-headline stacks.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Any block of body copy that exceeds 75 characters per line is wrong.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: When in doubt about depth, step the surface tone, do not add shadow. Canvas, Quiet Slate, Raised Slate, Hover Slate. If a fourth is needed, the design is wrong.

rules.name: The Float-Earns-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadow is reserved for elements that genuinely overhang the page (the SearchBar pill, the popovers). It is never decorative.

dos: Do use real photography on any surface that has room for an image.
Do keep Cornflower Beacon under ten percent of any rendered screen.
Do step surface tones (Tinted Pitch, Quiet Slate, Raised Slate, Hover Slate) when more depth is needed. Tonal layering before shadow, always.
Do use exponential ease (cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)) on every transition. 150ms for state, 180ms for popovers, 600ms for hero entrances.
Do cap body line length at 65 to 75 characters.
Do name colors by what they evoke (Cornflower Beacon, Reykjavík Sky) in code comments and prose.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Float, parallax, and image-scale-on-hover stop. Popover open/close keeps opacity, drops translateY.
Do keep one Display per page. If a section needs a second hero, use Headline instead.
donts: Don't look like Kayak, Expedia, or Booking.com. If a screen reads as a 1099, it is failing.
Don't look like a Pinterest-pretty travel listicle. No grids of decontextualized photos with captions like 'Tropical Paradise.'
Don't look like a generic AI startup landing. No three-icon feature row. No 'powered by AI' copy.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The only allowed blur is nav-glass on the sticky header.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing. Walter does not announce itself.
Don't pair an eyebrow with a headline. The headline stands alone.
Don't add a shadow to a card at rest. Shadow appears only on hover, focus, or on elements that genuinely float.
Don't invent secondary or tertiary accent colors. Cornflower Beacon is the only voice.
